name: @openvole/paw-shell
description: Paw for executing shell commands with safety restrictions

tools.name: shell_exec
tools.description: Run a shell command synchronously and return its output

tools.name: shell_exec_background
tools.description: Run a shell command in the background and return a process ID

tools.name: shell_status
tools.description: Check the status of a background process by its process ID

tools.name: shell_kill
tools.description: Kill a background process by its process ID
